title: All function pointers are fat pointers: { fn_ptr, ctx: *anyopaque }
description: Change the representation of all function pointer types to two words: a function address and a context pointer. Non-using functions have ctx = null and dispatch directly. This is the uniform representation — no caller needs to know whether a function pointer was created from a using or non-using function. Cost: function pointer size doubles. Benefit: using(allocator) composes with indirect dispatch.
